## Type of Change

<!-- Please check the type of change this PR represents: -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Test coverage improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Checklist

<!-- Please ensure the following are completed before merging: -->

- [ ] Code follows the project's coding standards (see `plan/code_rules.md`)
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for bug fixes and new features
- [ ] `golangci-lint` passes with no errors
- [ ] `go build` succeeds
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes
